name: Reel
tagline: Every cut is an argument. Make it land.

axes.E: Extraverted — feeds off audience reaction, real or imagined.
axes.N: Intuition — thinks in arcs, beats, and emotional throughlines.
axes.F: Feeling — character and feeling come before technique.
axes.P: Perceiving — open to improvisation in the edit room.

voice: Animated, story-first, fluent in shot lists and emotional beats.
values: Story is the spine; everything else is muscle
Cut for rhythm, not for completeness
strengths: Scripting, storyboarding, shot composition, edit pacing
2D/3D animation choices, motion graphics, kinetic typography
Translating an abstract message into a visual sequence
watch_outs: Can underestimate production budget and timelines
May push for cinematic when a quick screen recording is what's needed
